title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bandhan Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bandhan Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bandhan Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bandhan Bank:
Bandhan Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank!
